Klasse SysexRecorder

java.lang.Object
de.btu.kt.syx.util.SysexRecorder
Alle implementierten Schnittstellen:
ILogger
public class SysexRecorder extends Object implements ILogger
Recorder for MIDI system exclusive messages and SYX file support.
Autor:
Matthias Wolff

  • Konstruktorübersicht

    Konstruktoren
    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung
    SysexRecorder()
    Creates a new SysEx message recorder.

  • Methodenübersicht

    Modifizierer und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    void
    addSysExListener(ISysexMessageListener listener)
    Adds a SysEx message listener to this recorder.
    String
    getLogID()
    Returns the ID of this logger (max. 8 characters).
    SysexMessage[]
    getTape()
    Returns the recorder's tape.
    int
    getVerbose()
    Returns the verbose level of this logger.
    void
    play()
    Plays back this recorder's tape.
    void
    readSyxFile(String fileName)
    Reads a MIDI SysEx file into this recorder's tape.
    void
    readTxtFile(String fileName)
    Reads a MIDI SysEx text file.
    void
    record(SysexMessage msg)
    Appends a
    Ungültige Referenz 
    SysEx message
    to this recorder's tape.
    void
    removeSysExListener(ISysexMessageListener listener)
    Removes a SysEx message listener from this recorder.
    void
    reset()
    Clears this recorder's tape
    void
    setVerbose(int verbose)
     
    void
    writeSyxFile(String fileName)
    Writes this recorder's tape into a MIDI SysEx file.
    void
    writeTxtFile(String fileName)
    Writes this recorder's tape into a MIDI SysEx file.

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden java.lang.Object

    equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    Von Schnittstelle geerbte Methoden de.btu.kt.syx.util.ILogger

    errlog, errlog, errlog, errlog, log, log, log, log, logHrule, logHrule, setLogIndent

  • Konstruktordetails

    • SysexRecorder

      public SysexRecorder()
      Creates a new SysEx message recorder.

  • Methodendetails

    • addSysExListener

      public void addSysExListener(ISysexMessageListener listener)
      Adds a SysEx message listener to this recorder.
      Parameter:
      listener - The listener.

    • removeSysExListener

      public void removeSysExListener(ISysexMessageListener listener)
      Removes a SysEx message listener from this recorder.
      Parameter:
      listener - The listener.

    • reset

      public void reset()
      Clears this recorder's tape

    • record

      public void record(SysexMessage msg)
      Appends a
      Ungültige Referenz 
      SysEx message
      to this recorder's tape.
      Parameter:
      msg - The Message.
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException - if msg is null.

    • play

      public void play()
      Plays back this recorder's tape.

    • getTape

      public SysexMessage[] getTape()
      Returns the recorder's tape.
      Gibt zurück:
      An array of SysEx messages

    • readSyxFile

      public void readSyxFile(String fileName) throws IOException
      Reads a MIDI SysEx file into this recorder's tape.
      Parameter:
      fileName - The SYX file path.
      Löst aus:
      IOException

    • writeSyxFile

      public void writeSyxFile(String fileName) throws IOException
      Writes this recorder's tape into a MIDI SysEx file.
      Parameter:
      fileName - The SYX file path.
      Löst aus:
      IOException

    • readTxtFile

      public void readTxtFile(String fileName) throws IOException
      Reads a MIDI SysEx text file. The file is expected to contain a white-space separated list of two-digit hexadecimal numbers.
      Parameter:
      fileName - The text file path.
      Löst aus:
      IOException

    • writeTxtFile

      public void writeTxtFile(String fileName) throws IOException
      Writes this recorder's tape into a MIDI SysEx file.
      Parameter:
      fileName - The SYX file path.
      Löst aus:
      IOException

    • getVerbose

      public int getVerbose()
      Beschreibung aus Schnittstelle kopiert: ILogger
      Returns the verbose level of this logger. Log messages
      Angegeben von:
      getVerbose in Schnittstelle ILogger

    • setVerbose

      public void setVerbose(int verbose)

    • getLogID

      public String getLogID()
      Beschreibung aus Schnittstelle kopiert: ILogger
      Returns the ID of this logger (max. 8 characters).
      Angegeben von:
      getLogID in Schnittstelle ILogger
